title: GREENESAGE 100 Pack 8oz Disposable Bowls Small Paper Eco-Friendly, Sugarcane Strong Brown Biodegradable Soup Bowl for Parties BBQ Picnic
features: MATERIAL: This disposable paper bowls made of natural sugarcane fibre, that is a biodegradable and renewable material. These eco-friendly strong disposable bowls are organic and it’s a perfect substitute for non-recyclable materials. After using just toss them in the compost bin.

PACK INCLUDE: Include 100 pack brown paper bowls disposable with capacity of 8 ounces. According to your demand, stock up these biodegradable bowls for your daily using. We bring you the best quality disposable serving bowls at the best price.

STRONG PAPER BOWLS: These sugarcane bowls are super rigid, waterproof and oil resistant, not easily cut, stronger than ordinary paper bowls. You can be sure that these disposable bowls for hot food won't get easily damaged by cutlery, heat, or greasy foods.
SAFE AND RELIABLE: This small disposable soup bowls can be safely used in the microwave and be stored in the freezer. Nor will it melt or deform when heated in the microwave.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL APPLICATIONS: You can use these disposable bowls for parties to hot and cold meals, soup, desserts, salads, ice cream and so on. Suitable for party, gathering, wedding, picnic, BBQ, or daily use.

sales_rank_details_table.title: Energizer LED 2D 2 Pin GR8 Bulb, 7W = 16W, 750 Lumens, 4000K Cool White, 30 Year Lifespan
features: WATTAGE EFFICIENCY: 7W 2D LED lamp provides equivalent light output to a 16W traditional bulb, offering significant energy savings
LIGHT OUTPUT: Produces 750 lumens of cool white light at 4000K colour temperature, perfect for task lighting
LONG LIFESPAN: Rated for 30,000 hours of operation, equivalent to approximately 30 years of typical household use
COMPATIBILITY: Features a 2-pin GR8 base design for direct replacement in compatible light fixtures
DESIGN: Butterfly-style 2D lamp configuration ensures wide light distribution and uniform illumination
sales_rank_details_table.description: Illuminate your space efficiently with this LED 2D lamp featuring a GR8 2-pin base. Operating at 7W whilst delivering light output equivalent to a 16W traditional bulb, this lamp produces a bright 750 lumens of cool white light at 4000K colour temperature. Perfect for commercial and residential applications, it offers remarkable longevity with up to 30,000 hours of operation. The lamp provides consistent, flicker-free illumination ideal for offices, retail spaces, and home environments. Its 2-pin GR8 fitting ensures compatibility with existing fixtures, making it a straightforward replacement option. The cool white output creates an invigorating atmosphere suitable for task-oriented spaces. With its energy-efficient performance and extended lifespan, this LED lamp offers a practical lighting
